fighter-fighting-style.name: Fighting Style
fighter-fighting-style.description: You adopt a particular style of fighting as your specialty.

fighter-second-wind.name: Second Wind
fighter-second-wind.description: You have a limited well of stamina that you can draw on to protect yourself from harm.

fighter-action-surge.name: Action Surge
fighter-action-surge.description: On your turn, you can take one additional action. Once you use this feature, you must finish a short or long rest before you can use it again.

fighter-extra-attack.name: Extra Attack
fighter-extra-attack.description: You can attack twice, instead of once, whenever you take the Attack action on your turn.

fighter-indomitable.name: Indomitable
fighter-indomitable.description: You can reroll a saving throw that you fail. If you do so, you must use the new roll, and you can't use this feature again until you finish a long rest.

champion-improved-critical.name: Improved Critical
champion-improved-critical.description: Your weapon attacks score a critical hit on a roll of 19 or 20.

champion-remarkable-athlete.name: Remarkable Athlete
champion-remarkable-athlete.description: Add half your proficiency bonus (round up) to any STR, DEX, or CON checks that don't already use your proficiency bonus.

champion-superior-critical.name: Superior Critical
champion-superior-critical.description: Your weapon attacks score a critical hit on a roll of 18–20.

champion-survivor.name: Survivor
champion-survivor.description: At the start of each of your turns, regain hit points equal to 5 + CON mod if you have no more than half your hit points left.

battlemaster-combat-superiority.name: Combat Superiority
battlemaster-combat-superiority.description: Learn three maneuvers and gain four superiority dice (d8s) to fuel them.

battlemaster-know-your-enemy.name: Know Your Enemy
battlemaster-know-your-enemy.description: Study a creature for 1 minute to learn how it compares to you in two characteristics.

battlemaster-relentless.name: Relentless
battlemaster-relentless.description: When you roll initiative and have no superiority dice remaining, you regain one.

eldritchknight-spellcasting.name: Spellcasting
eldritchknight-spellcasting.description: Learn two cantrips and three 1st-level wizard spells. Intelligence is your spellcasting ability.

eldritchknight-war-magic.name: War Magic
eldritchknight-war-magic.description: When you use your action to cast a cantrip, you can make one weapon attack as a bonus action.

eldritchknight-eldritch-strike.name: Eldritch Strike
eldritchknight-eldritch-strike.description: When you hit a creature with a weapon attack, it has disadvantage on the next saving throw against a spell you cast.

eldritchknight-arcane-charge.name: Arcane Charge
eldritchknight-arcane-charge.description: When you use Action Surge, you can teleport up to 30 feet to an unoccupied space you can see.

eldritchknight-improved-war-magic.name: Improved War Magic
eldritchknight-improved-war-magic.description: When you cast a spell (not just a cantrip), you can make one weapon attack as a bonus action.

fighting-style-archery.name: Fighting Style: Archery
fighting-style-archery.description: You gain a +2 bonus to attack rolls you make with ranged weapons.

fighting-style-defense.name: Fighting Style: Defense
fighting-style-defense.description: While you are wearing armor, you gain a +1 bonus to AC.

fighting-style-dueling.name: Fighting Style: Dueling
fighting-style-dueling.description: When you are wielding a melee weapon in one hand and no other weapons, you gain a +2 bonus to damage rolls with that weapon.

fighting-style-great-weapon-fighting.name: Fighting Style: Great Weapon Fighting
fighting-style-great-weapon-fighting.description: When you roll a 1 or 2 on a damage die for an attack you make with a melee weapon that you are wielding with two hands, you can reroll the die and must use the new roll.

fighting-style-protection.name: Fighting Style: Protection
fighting-style-protection.description: When a creature you can see attacks a target other than you that is within 5 feet of you, you can use your reaction to impose disadvantage on the attack roll. You must be wielding a shield.

fighting-style-two-weapon-fighting.name: Fighting Style: Two-Weapon Fighting
fighting-style-two-weapon-fighting.description: When you engage in two-weapon fighting, you can add your ability modifier to the damage of the second attack.

dwarf-darkvision.name: Darkvision
dwarf-darkvision.description: You can see in dim light within 60 feet of you as if it were bright light, and in darkness as if it were dim light.

dwarf-dwarven-resilience.name: Dwarven Resilience
dwarf-dwarven-resilience.description: You have advantage on saving throws against poison, and you have resistance against poison damage.

dwarf-stonecunning.name: Stonecunning
dwarf-stonecunning.description: Whenever you make an Intelligence (History) check related to the origin of stonework, you are considered proficient in the History skill and add double your proficiency bonus.

champion.name: Champion
champion.description: The archetypal Champion focuses on the development of raw physical power honed to deadly perfection. Those who model themselves on this archetype combine rigorous training with physical excellence to deal devastating blows.

battlemaster.name: Battle Master
battlemaster.description: Those who emulate the Battle Master archetype employ martial techniques passed down through generations. A Battle Master uses superiority dice to fuel special maneuvers that grant tactical advantage in combat.

eldritchknight.name: Eldritch Knight
eldritchknight.description: The Eldritch Knight combines martial prowess with careful study of magic. These fighters learn to cast spells from the wizard spell list, weaving magic into their weapon strikes and defenses.

landcircle.name: Circle of the Land
landcircle.description: The Circle of the Land connects druids to the mystical power of a specific terrain, granting spells that reflect that land's nature and deepening their connection to the natural world.

mooncircle.name: Circle of the Moon
mooncircle.description: The Circle of the Moon channels the ferocity of the moon and the power of Wild Shape, allowing druids to transform into increasingly powerful beasts in combat.

archery.name: Archery
archery.description: You gain a +2 bonus to attack rolls you make with ranged weapons.

defense.name: Defense
defense.description: While you are wearing armor, you gain a +1 bonus to AC.

dueling.name: Dueling
dueling.description: When you are wielding a melee weapon in one hand and no other weapons, you gain a +2 bonus to damage rolls with that weapon.

great-weapon-fighting.name: Great Weapon Fighting
great-weapon-fighting.description: When you roll a 1 or 2 on a damage die for an attack you make with a melee weapon that you are wielding with two hands, you can reroll the die and must use the new roll. The weapon must have the two-handed or versatile property.

protection.name: Protection
protection.description: When a creature you can see attacks a target other than you that is within 5 feet of you, you can use your reaction to impose disadvantage on the attack roll. You must be wielding a shield.

two-weapon-fighting.name: Two-Weapon Fighting
two-weapon-fighting.description: When you engage in two-weapon fighting, you can add your ability modifier to the damage of the second attack.

martial-weapon-and-shield.name: A martial weapon and a shield

druid-starter-kit.name: Leather armor, a druidic focus, and an explorer's pack

arctic.name: Arctic
arctic.description: Frozen tundra and glacial terrain where survival demands mastery of cold and ice.

coast.name: Coast
coast.description: Shoreline and littoral environments where land meets sea.

desert.name: Desert
desert.description: Arid wastes of sand and rock where heat and thirst are constant threats.

forest.name: Forest
forest.description: Dense woodland where light filters through canopy and ancient trees hold secrets.

grassland.name: Grassland
grassland.description: Open plains of tall grasses swept by wind, home to vast herds.

mountain.name: Mountain
mountain.description: High peaks of bare stone and thin air, demanding both strength and sure footing.

swamp.name: Swamp
swamp.description: Murky wetlands of twisted trees and stagnant water teeming with hidden life.

underdark.name: Underdark
underdark.description: The vast lightless caves and tunnels beneath the earth, home to strange and dangerous beings.

druidcraft.name: Druidcraft
druidcraft.description: A minor effect tied to nature's forces: predict weather, make a flower bloom, light or snuff a candle, or create a harmless sensory effect.

guidance.name: Guidance
guidance.description: Touch a willing creature to grant it a d4 bonus on one ability check of its choice before the spell ends.

mending.name: Mending
mending.description: Repair a single break or tear in an object — a broken chain link, cracked goblet, or torn page — provided the break is no larger than 1 foot in any dimension.

poison-spray.name: Poison Spray
poison-spray.description: Extend your hand to project a puff of noxious gas; the target must succeed on a Constitution saving throw or take 1d12 poison damage.

produce-flame.name: Produce Flame
produce-flame.description: A flickering flame appears in your palm, shedding bright light in a 10-foot radius; you can hurl it as a ranged spell attack for fire damage.

resistance.name: Resistance
resistance.description: Touch a willing creature; before the spell ends, it may roll a d4 and add the result to one saving throw of its choice.

shillelagh.name: Shillelagh
shillelagh.description: Wood of a club or quarterstaff becomes imbued with nature's power — it uses your spellcasting ability for attack and damage rolls and its damage die becomes a d8.

thorn-whip.name: Thorn Whip
thorn-whip.description: Create a long vine-like whip covered in thorns; on a hit it deals 1d6 piercing damage and pulls a Large or smaller creature up to 10 feet toward you.

animal-friendship.name: Animal Friendship
animal-friendship.description: Convince a beast of your benign intent; if it fails a Wisdom save, it is charmed by you for 24 hours.

charm-person.name: Charm Person
charm-person.description: Attempt to charm a humanoid; on a failed Wisdom save it regards you as a friendly acquaintance for up to 1 hour or until you harm it.

create-or-destroy-water.name: Create or Destroy Water
create-or-destroy-water.description: Either conjure up to 10 gallons of clean water in open containers nearby, or destroy the same volume of water in open containers or fog.

cure-wounds.name: Cure Wounds
cure-wounds.description: A touched creature regains hit points equal to 1d8 plus your spellcasting ability modifier; no effect on undead or constructs.

detect-magic.name: Detect Magic
detect-magic.description: For up to 10 minutes you sense the presence and school of any magic within 30 feet of you.

detect-poison-and-disease.name: Detect Poison and Disease
detect-poison-and-disease.description: Sense the presence and location of poisons, poisonous creatures, and diseases within 30 feet for up to 10 minutes.

entangle.name: Entangle
entangle.description: Grasping weeds and vines sprout from the ground in a 20-foot square, restraining creatures that fail a Strength save for up to 1 minute.

faerie-fire.name: Faerie Fire
faerie-fire.description: Outline objects and creatures in a 20-foot cube with blue, green, or violet light; affected creatures can't benefit from invisibility and attacks against them have advantage.

fog-cloud.name: Fog Cloud
fog-cloud.description: Create a 20-foot radius sphere of thick fog centered on a point you choose; the area is heavily obscured for up to 1 hour.

goodberry.name: Goodberry
goodberry.description: Up to ten berries appear in your hand, each of which heals 1 hit point when consumed and provides enough nourishment for one day.

healing-word.name: Healing Word
healing-word.description: A creature you can see within range regains hit points equal to 1d4 plus your spellcasting modifier; cast as a bonus action.

ice-knife.name: Ice Knife
ice-knife.description: Hurl a shard of ice at one creature; on a hit deal 1d10 piercing damage, then the ice explodes dealing 2d6 cold damage to creatures within 5 feet on a failed Dexterity save.

jump.name: Jump
jump.description: Touch a creature; its jump distance is tripled until the spell ends.

longstrider.name: Longstrider
longstrider.description: Touch a creature; its speed increases by 10 feet for 1 hour.

purify-food-and-drink.name: Purify Food and Drink
purify-food-and-drink.description: All non-magical food and drink within a 5-foot radius sphere is purified, removing poison and disease.

speak-with-animals.name: Speak with Animals
speak-with-animals.description: Gain the ability to verbally communicate with beasts for 10 minutes; they may not be intelligent enough to convey complex information.

thunderwave.name: Thunderwave
thunderwave.description: A wave of thunderous force sweeps a 15-foot cube; creatures that fail a Constitution save take 2d8 thunder damage and are pushed 10 feet, or half damage on a success.

animal-messenger.name: Animal Messenger
animal-messenger.description: Compel a Tiny beast to carry a message to a destination; it travels for up to 24 hours to reach the target you describe.

barkskin.name: Barkskin
barkskin.description: The target's skin becomes tough and bark-like; its AC can't be less than 16 while the spell is active.

beast-sense.name: Beast Sense
beast-sense.description: Touch a willing beast; you can use your action to see through its eyes and hear through its ears for up to 1 hour.

darkvision.name: Darkvision
darkvision.description: A touched creature gains the ability to see in darkness — dim light within 60 feet becomes bright, and darkness becomes dim — for 8 hours.

enhance-ability.name: Enhance Ability
enhance-ability.description: Bestow a magical enhancement on a creature: advantage on ability checks and in some cases additional benefits depending on the chosen ability.

find-traps.name: Find Traps
find-traps.description: Sense the presence of any trap within range — mechanical or magical — though the spell doesn't reveal the trap's exact location.

flame-blade.name: Flame Blade
flame-blade.description: Evoke a fiery blade in your free hand that deals 3d6 fire damage on a hit, sheds bright light in a 10-foot radius, and is not a metal weapon.

flaming-sphere.name: Flaming Sphere
flaming-sphere.description: Conjure a 5-foot diameter sphere of fire that you can move up to 30 feet each turn; creatures adjacent to it take 2d6 fire damage on a failed Dexterity save.

gust-of-wind.name: Gust of Wind
gust-of-wind.description: A strong wind blasts from you in a 60-foot line, pushing creatures that fail a Strength save 15 feet away and impeding movement into the wind.

heat-metal.name: Heat Metal
heat-metal.description: Make a metal object glow red-hot; a creature in contact with it takes 2d8 fire damage and must drop it on a failed Constitution save.

hold-person.name: Hold Person
hold-person.description: Target a humanoid you can see; on a failed Wisdom save it is paralyzed for up to 1 minute, with repeat saves each turn.

lesser-restoration.name: Lesser Restoration
lesser-restoration.description: Touch a creature to end either one disease or one of the following conditions: blinded, deafened, paralyzed, or poisoned.

locate-animals-or-plants.name: Locate Animals or Plants
locate-animals-or-plants.description: Name a specific kind of beast or plant; you sense the direction of the nearest example of that kind within 5 miles, if any.

locate-object.name: Locate Object
locate-object.description: Describe or name an object you are familiar with; you sense its direction as long as it is within 1000 feet and not blocked by running water.

moonbeam.name: Moonbeam
moonbeam.description: A silvery beam of pale light shines down in a 5-foot radius cylinder; creatures that enter or start their turn there take 2d10 radiant damage on a failed Constitution save.

pass-without-trace.name: Pass Without Trace
pass-without-trace.description: A veil of shadows and silence allows you and up to 10 willing companions to add +10 to Stealth checks and leave no tracks for up to 1 hour.

protection-from-poison.name: Protection from Poison
protection-from-poison.description: Touch a creature; neutralize any poison affecting it, and grant it advantage on saves against poison and resistance to poison damage for 1 hour.

spike-growth.name: Spike Growth
spike-growth.description: The ground in a 20-foot radius becomes covered with sharp spikes; creatures moving through take 2d4 piercing damage per 5 feet and the area becomes difficult terrain.

call-lightning.name: Call Lightning
call-lightning.description: Summon a storm cloud; on each of your turns you can call a bolt of lightning that deals 3d10 lightning damage in a 5-foot cylinder on a failed Dexterity save.

conjure-animals.name: Conjure Animals
conjure-animals.description: Summon fey spirits that take the form of beasts — choose any combination of CR totaling 2 — which obey your verbal commands for up to 1 hour.

daylight.name: Daylight
daylight.description: A 60-foot radius sphere of bright daylight emanates from a touched point or object for 1 hour, overriding magical darkness of 3rd level or lower.

dispel-magic.name: Dispel Magic
dispel-magic.description: Choose a creature, object, or magical effect within range; any spell of 3rd level or lower on the target ends automatically, and higher-level spells end on a successful spellcasting check.

erupting-earth.name: Erupting Earth
erupting-earth.description: Choose a point on the ground; a 20-foot cube erupts with rock and dirt dealing 3d12 bludgeoning damage on a failed Dexterity save and becoming difficult terrain.

feign-death.name: Feign Death
feign-death.description: Touch a willing creature to make it appear dead; it is blinded, incapacitated, resistant to all damage except psychic, and undetectable as alive for 1 hour.

meld-into-stone.name: Meld into Stone
meld-into-stone.description: Step inside a Large or bigger piece of rock, merging with it and remaining there undetected for up to 8 hours; you can't be harmed while merged.

plant-growth.name: Plant Growth
plant-growth.description: Cause vegetation in a 100-foot radius to become overgrown and difficult to traverse, or in 8 hours enrich soil within a half-mile radius to yield twice the normal harvest.

protection-from-energy.name: Protection from Energy
protection-from-energy.description: A touched creature gains resistance to one energy type — acid, cold, fire, lightning, or thunder — for up to 1 hour.

sleet-storm.name: Sleet Storm
sleet-storm.description: Freezing rain fills a 20-foot tall, 40-foot radius cylinder; the area is difficult terrain, creatures that fail Dexterity saves fall prone, and concentration checks are required.

speak-with-plants.name: Speak with Plants
speak-with-plants.description: Imbue plants around you with awareness; they can relay information, answer simple questions, and at your request hinder movement through the area.

water-breathing.name: Water Breathing
water-breathing.description: Up to 10 willing creatures can breathe underwater for 24 hours without any penalty.

water-walk.name: Water Walk
water-walk.description: Up to 10 willing creatures can walk across liquids as if they were solid ground for 1 hour.

wind-wall.name: Wind Wall
wind-wall.description: A wall of strong wind rises from the ground; Small and smaller creatures are pushed back, ranged attacks through it are deflected, and gases are dispersed.

blight.name: Blight
blight.description: Draw the moisture from a creature; it takes 8d8 necrotic damage on a failed Constitution save, or half on a success — plants are especially vulnerable.

confusion.name: Confusion
confusion.description: A wave of confusion sweeps through a 10-foot radius sphere; affected creatures may act randomly on their turns for up to 1 minute.

conjure-minor-elementals.name: Conjure Minor Elementals
conjure-minor-elementals.description: Summon elemental spirits in CR combinations totaling up to 4 that obey your verbal commands for up to 1 hour.

conjure-woodland-beings.name: Conjure Woodland Beings
conjure-woodland-beings.description: Summon fey spirits in CR combinations totaling up to 4 that obey your commands for up to 1 hour.

control-water.name: Control Water
control-water.description: Exert control over water in a 100-foot cube: flood, part, redirect its flow, or create a whirlpool for up to 10 minutes.

dominate-beast.name: Dominate Beast
dominate-beast.description: A beast that fails a Wisdom save is charmed and you have a telepathic link to it; it follows your commands for up to 1 minute.

freedom-of-movement.name: Freedom of Movement
freedom-of-movement.description: Touch a creature; difficult terrain costs it no extra movement and magic can't reduce its speed or cause it to be paralyzed or restrained for 1 hour.

giant-insect.name: Giant Insect
giant-insect.description: Transform up to 10 centipedes, 3 spiders, 5 wasps, or 1 scorpion into giant versions of themselves that obey your commands for up to 10 minutes.

grasping-vine.name: Grasping Vine
grasping-vine.description: Command a vine to spring from the ground; on your command it makes a melee spell attack to pull a Large or smaller creature up to 20 feet toward the vine's base.

hallucinatory-terrain.name: Hallucinatory Terrain
hallucinatory-terrain.description: Natural terrain in a 150-foot cube takes on the appearance of different natural terrain; the illusion persists for 24 hours or until dispelled.

ice-storm.name: Ice Storm
ice-storm.description: Hail and sleet fall in a 20-foot radius, 40-foot tall cylinder; creatures in the area take 2d8 bludgeoning and 4d6 cold damage, and the area becomes difficult terrain until your next turn.

locate-creature.name: Locate Creature
locate-creature.description: Sense the direction of a specific creature you name or describe within 1000 feet; blocked if the creature is in running water.

polymorph.name: Polymorph
polymorph.description: Transform a creature you can see into a new form; it retains alignment but uses the target's game statistics except for Intelligence, Wisdom, and Charisma.

stone-shape.name: Stone Shape
stone-shape.description: Touch a Medium or smaller object of stone to reshape it — form a weapon, create a door in a wall, or make a small receptacle.

stoneskin.name: Stoneskin
stoneskin.description: The target's skin becomes as hard as stone, granting resistance to nonmagical bludgeoning, piercing, and slashing damage for up to 1 hour.

wall-of-fire.name: Wall of Fire
wall-of-fire.description: Create a wall of fire up to 60 feet long, 20 feet high, and 1 foot thick; creatures that enter or start their turn there take 5d8 fire damage.

antilife-shell.name: Antilife Shell
antilife-shell.description: A shimmering barrier extends from you in a 10-foot radius, preventing living creatures from entering or passing through it for up to 1 hour.

awaken.name: Awaken
awaken.description: After spending 8 hours casting this spell, a touched plant or beast with Intelligence 3 or lower gains Intelligence 10 or your Intelligence score and the ability to speak one language you know.

commune-with-nature.name: Commune with Nature
commune-with-nature.description: Briefly commune with nature to gain knowledge of the surrounding territory within 3 miles, learning up to 3 facts about the land — terrain, water, plants, minerals, settlements, or creatures.

conjure-elemental.name: Conjure Elemental
conjure-elemental.description: Call forth an elemental of challenge rating 5 or lower from the appropriate elemental plane; it serves you for up to 1 hour or until its element is removed.

contagion.name: Contagion
contagion.description: Make a melee spell attack; a hit infects the target with one of six diseases that manifests after 3 consecutive failed Constitution saves, lasting 7 days.

geas.name: Geas
geas.description: Issue a command that the target must obey for 30 days; each day it refuses or acts against the command it takes 5d10 psychic damage.

greater-restoration.name: Greater Restoration
greater-restoration.description: Touch a creature to imbue it with positive energy, ending one effect reducing ability scores, one curse, one exhaustion level, one charm or fright effect, or one petrification.

insect-plague.name: Insect Plague
insect-plague.description: A sphere of biting and stinging insects fills a 20-foot radius; creatures there take 4d10 piercing damage on a failed Constitution save, and the area is lightly obscured.

mass-cure-wounds.name: Mass Cure Wounds
mass-cure-wounds.description: A wave of healing energy washes out from a point you choose; up to 6 creatures within 30 feet each regain 3d8 plus your spellcasting modifier hit points.

planar-binding.name: Planar Binding
planar-binding.description: Attempt to bind a celestial, elemental, fey, or fiend within a magic circle; on a failed Charisma save it is bound to serve you for 24 hours.

reincarnate.name: Reincarnate
reincarnate.description: Touch a dead humanoid that has been dead no more than 10 days; its soul returns to life in a new adult body of a race determined by rolling on a table.

scrying.name: Scrying
scrying.description: Observe a specific creature or location on the same plane; the target makes a Wisdom save with modifiers based on familiarity, and on a failure you see and hear it for up to 10 minutes.

tree-stride.name: Tree Stride
tree-stride.description: Enter a living tree and exit from another tree of the same kind within 500 feet as part of your movement, for up to 1 minute.

wall-of-stone.name: Wall of Stone
wall-of-stone.description: Create a nonmagical wall of solid stone up to 30 feet long, 20 feet high, and 6 inches thick that can bridge gaps; it becomes permanent if you maintain concentration for the full duration.

mirror-image.name: Mirror Image
mirror-image.description: Three illusory duplicates of yourself appear; each time a creature attacks you it may hit a duplicate instead, destroying it, until all are gone.

misty-step.name: Misty Step
misty-step.description: Briefly surrounded by silvery mist, you teleport up to 30 feet to an unoccupied space you can see.

blur.name: Blur
blur.description: Your body becomes blurred and shifting; attack rolls against you have disadvantage unless the attacker doesn't rely on sight.

silence.name: Silence
silence.description: No sound can be created within or pass through a 20-foot radius sphere; creatures inside are immune to thunder damage and deafened.

create-food-and-water.name: Create Food and Water
create-food-and-water.description: Produce 45 pounds of food and 30 gallons of water in containers you can carry, sustaining up to 15 humanoids for one day.

spider-climb.name: Spider Climb
spider-climb.description: A touched creature gains the ability to move up, down, and across vertical and upside-down surfaces while keeping its hands free for up to 1 hour.

divination.name: Divination
divination.description: Contact your deity or a divine proxy to receive guidance; the GM provides a truthful reply about a specific goal, event, or activity occurring within 7 days.

invisibility.name: Invisibility
invisibility.description: A creature you touch becomes invisible for up to 1 hour; the effect ends if the target attacks or casts a spell.

haste.name: Haste
haste.description: One willing creature gains doubled speed, +2 to AC, advantage on Dexterity saves, and an additional action on each of its turns for up to 1 minute.

lightning-bolt.name: Lightning Bolt
lightning-bolt.description: A stroke of lightning blasts out in a 100-foot line, dealing 8d6 lightning damage to each creature in the area on a failed Dexterity save.

acid-arrow.name: Acid Arrow
acid-arrow.description: A shimmering green arrow strikes and splashes with acid; on a hit the target takes 4d4 acid damage immediately and 2d4 acid damage at the end of its next turn.

darkness.name: Darkness
darkness.description: Magical darkness spreads from a point or object in a 15-foot radius, blocking darkvision and overriding any light from spells of 2nd level or lower.

stinking-cloud.name: Stinking Cloud
stinking-cloud.description: A 20-foot radius of yellow-green fog fills the area; creatures that fail a Constitution save spend their turn retching and can't take actions.

web.name: Web
web.description: Thick, sticky webs fill a 20-foot cube; creatures in the area that fail a Dexterity save are restrained, and the area is difficult terrain.

gaseous-form.name: Gaseous Form
gaseous-form.description: Transform a touched willing creature into a misty cloud that can fly at 10 feet, is immune to nonmagical damage, but can't attack, cast spells, or speak.

greater-invisibility.name: Greater Invisibility
greater-invisibility.description: You or a touched creature becomes invisible for up to 1 minute; the effect does not end if the target attacks or casts spells.

cloudkill.name: Cloudkill
cloudkill.description: A 20-foot radius sphere of yellow-green fog billows from a point; creatures inside take 5d8 poison damage on a failed Constitution save, and the cloud moves 10 feet each turn.

slow.name: Slow
slow.description: Up to 6 creatures in a 40-foot cube are slowed on a failed Wisdom save: half movement, -2 to AC and Dex saves, no reactions, and only one action or bonus action per turn.

cone-of-cold.name: Cone of Cold
cone-of-cold.description: A blast of cold air erupts from your hands in a 60-foot cone; creatures take 8d8 cold damage on a failed Constitution save, or half on success — killed creatures become ice statues.

passwall.name: Passwall
passwall.description: A passage appears in a wooden, plaster, or stone wall at a point you touch; the passage is 5 feet wide, 8 feet tall, and up to 20 feet deep, lasting 1 hour.

dream.name: Dream
dream.description: You or a willing creature enters a dream state and sends a message to a sleeping creature; a hostile target must succeed on a Wisdom save or be haunted by terrible nightmares.
